summary_en: Specific COC targets and metrics not disclosed in cover letter. Board resolved on May 14, 2026 to pursue capital-cost and share-price-conscious management; detailed policy disclosed in attached materials.
title_en: Response Toward Realizing Management Conscious of Capital Cost and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Kyokuto Boeki Kaisha's board of directors resolved to implement measures aimed at realizing management that is conscious of capital cost and stock price. The company has analyzed and evaluated its current situation and determined its policy direction going forward. Specific targets, metrics, timelines, and implementation details are contained in the attached materials and are not summarized in this cover letter.
